name: Miami-Dade County Public Housing and Community Development
description_short: Miami-Dade County Public Housing and Community Development is a credit repair provider based in Miami, Florida. Rated 3.4/5 with 47 Google reviews, reflecting mixed customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Miami-Dade County Public Housing and Community Development is a credit repair provider serving clients in Miami, Florida. Carrying a 3.4/5.0 Google rating from 47 reviews, Miami-Dade County Public Housing and Community Development has an mixed reputation among consumers in the Miami area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Miami-Dade County Public Housing and Community Development specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Miami, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Miami-Dade County Public Housing and Community Development operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Miami, Florida area who are considering Miami-Dade County Public Housing and Community Development should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
